title: salix incana var. brevifolia
intro: Salix incana var. brevifolia, also known as the Arctic willow, is a variety of the Salix incana plant, a type of shrub or small tree that belongs to the willow family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Salix incana var. brevifolia include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, as well as being used as a natural remedy for colds and respiratory issues. The plant's herbal preparations include tea, tincture, and infusion, which can be consumed internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
